paths.title: Paths
paths.subtitle: Curate ordered learning paths from your cards. Share them publicly under your profile.
paths.publicHint: Anyone with the link can read this path under your public profile.
paths.privateHint: Only you can see this path. Toggle public to share it.

empty.title: No paths yet
empty.body: Create your first path to bundle a series of cards into a mini-course.

paths.emptySteps: No steps yet — add cards to start building.
paths.noStepsToPlay: This path has no steps yet.
paths.signInToSaveScore: Sign in to save your score
paths.signInToSaveProgress: Sign in to save your progress
paths.coverHint: Auto-generated from the path title, description and first few card titles. Costs one image-API call.

confirmDelete.title: Delete this path?
confirmDelete.body: The path will be removed; the cards stay in your library.

pathQuiz.title: Path quiz
pathQuiz.empty: No quiz questions in this path's cards yet. Add cards with quizzes to start.

cardPicker.title: Pick cards
cardPicker.selectHint: Tap a card to select it.

feeds.title: Feeds
feeds.subtitle: Subscribe to RSS / Atom feeds — new posts get auto-summarised into cards.
feeds.empty: No subscriptions yet — paste an RSS or Atom URL above to start.

shareTarget.savingHint: We're queuing the page for ingestion. You'll be redirected in a second.
shareTarget.noUrl: No URL detected in the share. Open Mindshift and paste it manually.

tags.empty: No tags yet. Create your first one above.
tags.mobileFooterHint: Create, delete and reorder tags from the desktop app.
tags.modalFooterHint: Create, delete and reorder tags from the sidebar.

share.needsProfile: Set a username and enable your public profile under Settings → Account first.
share.publishHint: Publish this tag and every card it contains under your public profile. You can revoke at any time.

empty.title: No knowledge cards yet
empty.body: Add a YouTube video to get started.

addContent.wikiPlaceholder: Add wiki sources for movies, people, places, and things
addContent.notePlaceholderBody: Write your note in markdown — **bold**, *italic*, lists, links

import.empty: No items found in this file.
import.note: Imported pages store the raw text only — AI summaries, embeddings and connections run on each card just like normal ingestion.

bookmarks.title: Browser Bookmarks
bookmarks.body: Import bookmarks from Chrome, Firefox or Edge (.html export).

pocket.title: Pocket
pocket.body: Import your saved articles from Pocket.

markdown.title: Markdown Files
markdown.body: Import notes from Obsidian, Notion or any zip of markdown files.

card.notesPlaceholder: Write your notes here — bold, lists, headings, links
card.quizEmpty: No quiz questions for this card.
card.quizProcessing: Quiz will appear once the card finishes processing.
card.relatedEmptyBody: Save more cards on related topics — the edge engine surfaces semantic similarity, shared entities, shared tags and manual relations once the library has neighbours.
card.relatedLead: {{count}} cards in your library connect to this one.
card.highlightsEmptyBody: Open the original page with the Mindshift browser extension installed, select text, and click the highlight pill that appears.
card.highlightsOpenSource: Open original page at this highlight
card.highlightsRemoveBody: The highlight is removed everywhere — including on the original page.
card.deleteBody: This permanently removes the card, its transcript, summaries, notes and quiz items. The action cannot be undone.

auth.signInHint: Use the credentials you signed up with.
auth.signUpHint: Pick any email — single user mode.

settings.subtitle: Account and app options.
settings.aboutBody: Mindshift is a self-hosted AI knowledge base. Recall-inspired, but open-source and entirely yours.

extension.title: Browser extension
extension.body: Save the current page or your bookmarks tree from a single click in the toolbar. Install the unpacked extension from the extension/ folder, then paste the API URL + token below into its popup.
extension.tokenBody: Long-lived (1 year). Treat it like a password — anyone with the token can write to your knowledge base.

export.heading: Data
export.title: Export knowledge base
export.body: Download all your cards as Markdown files, organised by tag hierarchy (ZIP).

tags.subtitle: Manage your tag hierarchy. Rename, move, or delete tags here.
tags.name: Name
tags.empty: No tags yet. Add your first one above.

appearance.soundsBody: Subtle ticks on navigation, buttons and quiz answers.
appearance.defaultTranslationOff: Off — keep cards in their original language
appearance.defaultTranslationHint: Applies to the browser-extension side panel only. The main app keeps the original language.

graph.hint: Click a node to expand its connections, double-click to open the card.

selected.heading: Selected
selected.noEdges: This node has no connections yet.

scoreHelp.title: How connections are scored
scoreHelp.intro: Mindshift combines several signals into a single connection strength. The bars next to each connection show how strongly the system believes two cards belong together.
scoreHelp.semanticBody: Embeddings of both cards are compared. Cards about the same topic score high even if the wording differs.
scoreHelp.entityBody: People, products and places mentioned in both cards push the score up.
scoreHelp.tagBody: The same tag (or a tag in the same parent group) earns a bonus.
scoreHelp.manualBody: If you've explicitly linked two cards, that always wins.
scoreHelp.tooltipNote: Hover any connection to see the exact percentage.

isolated.title: This card has no connections yet.
isolated.body: Add more cards on related topics (shared tags or similar content) — connections form automatically.

global.title: Knowledge Graph
global.subtitle: Your full library as a network.
global.hint: Click a node to open the card. Lines reflect shared concepts, tags, or semantic similarity.
global.hint2: Click = card preview · Shift-click = focus on node + neighbours · Search supports ↑↓ and Enter.

empty.title: No cards yet
empty.body: Add a few cards to your library — the graph will show their connections.

review.subtitle: Practice due quiz questions with spaced repetition.

done.title: You're done.
done.body: No questions are due right now. Come back later.

mode.recallHint: Read, think, reveal, self-rate. Strongest for memory.
mode.mcHint: Pick from 4 options. Faster, easier on review days.
mode.noChoices: No choices stored for this question — falling back to recall.

chat.placeholderKb: Ask something about your knowledge base…
chat.kbSubtitle: Ask questions across all your cards.
chat.kbEmpty: Ask a question — answers come with citations.
chat.cardEmpty: Ask a question about this card's content.

search.subtitle: Ask a question — semantically or by keyword.
search.placeholderSemantic: e.g. "How do I remember things long term?"
search.hint: Tip: semantic understands questions, keyword finds exact matches.

global.title: Search
global.placeholderAi: Ask a question — semantic search across your KB
global.empty: No matches. Try AI search for a question instead.
global.modeHint: Switch between full-text and semantic search to find exactly what you need.

podcast.heading: Podcast
podcast.idleHint: Listen to a narrated version of this card. Generation runs once and takes ~30 seconds — uses your AI token quota.

share.title: Share
share.body: Create a public read-only link. Anyone with the link can view the card's summary and notes — no login needed.
share.revokeBody: Anyone with the link will lose access. The card itself stays in your library.

public.footer: This is a read-only view of a Mindshift card.
